Breakfast, lunch & dinner
Join us to discover your new favorite dish. Our daily specials are crafted with fresh ingredients and a lot of love, ensuring an unforgettable dining experience every time. Check back often to see what's new and delicious today!

Groups & Parties
Book your next party with us!
With flexible private party spaces and exceptional cuisine, your guests are sure to have a memorable and enjoyable experience. Your guests will be impressed by the ambiance and attention to detail, from start to finish.
parties
About metro
In the heart of the downtown hotel district Atlanta, Metro Diner & Bar proudly serves both the local crowd and out-of-towners. Designed on two levels, we have a traditional diner ambiance on the second floor with a karaoke bar at the first level entry. We entertain every night with our upbeat DJ and dance floor, and a fast and friendly bar service. At our restaurant, our goal is to provide delicious and satisfying food and beverages in a fun and friendly atmosphere with customer service our top priority.
upcoming events
Karaoke and DJ's - 7 days a week
At Metro Diner & Bar, every night is a celebration. Join us for an exquisite meal, stay for the electrifying entertainment, and discover why we're Atlanta's top choice for a night out. Come dine, dance, and sing with us, and let every moment become a cherished memory.

For good food with live karaoke and entertainment this is the spot! Open late nights which is a plus.

The food was delicious, exactly what we were expecting, cute lil spot, and super friendly staff! The sweet tea was on point!
Review by - Google
five star review by

Food was amazing. One of the best diners that I've had! I would highly recommend to my friends and family. The prices are reasonable, considering it's downtown.

Great food and a amazing place to hangout with friends, especially in late nights! The music is great, the food is nice, and the service is decent. Be sure to try the cakes!
